scripts.postinstall: mkdir -p public/fonts && cp node_modules/@fontsource/noto-sans-devanagari/files/noto-sans-devanagari-devanagari-400-normal.woff public/fonts/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp node_modules/@fontsource/anek-devanagari/files/anek-devanagari-devanagari-700-normal.woff public/fonts/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp node_modules/@fontsource/anek-devanagari/files/anek-devanagari-latin-700-normal.woff public/fonts/ 2>/dev/null || true && test -f public/fonts/anek-devanagari-700-full.ttf || curl -fsSL "https://fonts.gstatic.com/s/anekdevanagari/v17/jVyo7nP0CGrUsxB-QiRgw0NlLaVt_QUAkYxLRoCL23mlh20ZVHOMAWbgHLAKle9n.ttf" -o public/fonts/anek-devanagari-700-full.ttf
